description: An agent governance kernel for multi-agent systems. Enforces coordination boundaries, inter-agent communication permissions, and blast radius containment. Each agent must declare a role and operate strictly within its declared authority.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: (?:act as (?:the |another )agent|pretend to be|speak for (?:the other|another) agent|assume (?:their|its) role)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Agents cannot impersonate or assume the identity of other agents.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: (?:skip the handoff|don't coordinate|ignore the other agents|act independently of)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Coordination protocols cannot be bypassed in a multi-agent system.
Agent permissions are declared at build time and cannot be modified at runtime.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: (?:I(?:'ve| have) delegated|I asked (?:the other|another) agent to|I instructed .+ to act)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Agents cannot delegate tasks without explicit coordination permissions.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: (?:I also handled|I took care of .+ as well|I went ahead and .+ for the other)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Agents must not claim to have operated outside their declared scope.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: (?:no need to involve|I can handle everything|the other agents? (?:aren't|isn't) needed)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Agents must not discourage coordination or claim sole authority.

pause_actions.reason: Triggering actions in another agent requires human approval.
Writing to shared resources requires human approval.
All outbound communication requires human approval.

response_vocabulary.OUTSIDE_SCOPE: That action falls outside the authority granted to this agent's role.
response_vocabulary.RULE_VIOLATION: This system enforces coordination rules that prevent that action.
response_vocabulary.IDENTITY_OVERRIDE: Agent roles and coordination rules cannot be modified during an active session.
response_vocabulary.APPROVAL_REQUIRED: This cross-agent action requires your explicit approval.
response_vocabulary.ROLE_REQUIRED: Each agent must declare a valid role before any actions are processed.
